calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Jun-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner: Sarah Melinda List, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Declaration of Physician Linette Martinez, rec'd and filed in court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Seth Michael List and further orders the gender changed from Female to Male.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Jun-21-2007 Reset To Jun-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner: Sarah Melinda List, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
Lacks the proper medical declaration, matter is continued to June 28, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
